style_bible.prefix: (masterpiece, best quality), realistic cartoon style, 2.5D semi-realistic, 3D rendered Disney-like character, volumetric lighting, soft shadows, detailed fur texture, cinematic lighting,
style_bible.cat_base: anthropomorphic cat character, realistic proportions, detailed fur, large expressive Pixar-style eyes, big round sparkling glossy eyes with bright catchlights and vivid iris reflections, emotive soulful gaze, warm lively personality, charming facial expression, small pink nose, pointed ears, fluffy tail, subsurface scattering on fur, digital 3D render style,
style_bible.suffix: octane render, unreal engine 5, highly detailed, 4k, sharp focus, realistic lighting
style_bible.negative: dead eyes, lifeless eyes, glassy eyes, dull eyes, soulless, blank stare, empty expression, flat expression, vacant, taxidermy, uncanny, 2D flat, anime, sketch, drawing, painting, blurry, low quality, worst quality, normal quality, extra limbs, deformed paws, bad anatomy, human hands, human face, ugly, disfigured, complex background, watermark, signature, text, jpeg artifacts, duplicate, multiple cats, oversaturated
